name: Reina Condos
address: 689 The Queensway, Etobicoke, ON M8Y 1K5
why_strong: Newest building in zone (2024, all-female dev team). 1BR units from $2,100 - cheapest new-build pricing in central Etobicoke. Queensway/Royal York intersection has strong walkability (Starbucks, Mucho Burrito, LCBO, Sobeys). 9-storey scale feels human. Royal York subway 1.5km / 18-min walk OR 6-min bus.
why_weak: Subway not walkable (~1.5km). Many tiny <500sqft units. Some lower-floor units face Queensway noise.

name: 162 Berry Road (Realstar)
address: 162 Berry Road, Etobicoke, ON M8Y 1W2
why_strong: Realstar professional management = predictable lease + maintenance. Berry Road is a leafy mid-rise corridor - quietest pocket of Stonegate. Mimico Creek trail 350m. Sub-$2k 1BR with 600+sqft is the value play of the zone.
why_weak: Subway 1.6km to Royal York. Older building (1960s) with smaller balconies. Limited in-suite laundry - building laundry only.

name: 183 Berry Road
address: 183 Berry Road, Etobicoke, ON M8Y 1W4
why_strong: $1,799 1BR is the cheapest verified 1BR in zone - 20% under Stonegate median. Low-rise charm, 3 floorplans, Mimico Creek trail walkable for AM runs.
why_weak: Bus-only to subway. Modest amenities - no gym, no concierge. Older-stock kitchens.

name: 143 Stephen Drive (MetCap)
address: 143 Stephen Drive, Etobicoke, ON M8Y 3N5
why_strong: $1,784 verified - confirmed 621 sqft - best $/sqft in zone at $2.87. MetCap manages well, virtual tour live. Mimico Creek 300m, Berry Road retail strip 5-min walk.
why_weak: Subway 1.5km. MetCap response times mixed reputation. Stephen Drive cul-de-sac feel - quiet, but isolated.

name: 115 Stephen Drive
address: 115 Stephen Drive, Etobicoke, ON M8Y 3N4
why_strong: Sister building to 143 - same Stonegate quiet pocket. 2BR sub-$2,300 rare in 2026 Toronto. Berry Rd amenities walkable.
why_weak: Subway bus-dependent. Aging 1960s low-rise.

name: 317 Park Lawn Road (MetCap)
address: 317 Park Lawn Road, Etobicoke, ON M8Y 3K2
why_strong: 2BR at $2,249 is exceptional for the size band. Park Lawn corridor - straight QEW shot to CVH (23 min). Future Park Lawn GO station 600m (planned 2027 opening per Metrolinx).
why_weak: 66 bus to Old Mill subway - bus-dependent. Building dates to 1970s.

name: 1 Crown Hill Place (MetCap)
address: 1 Crown Hill Place, Etobicoke, ON M8Y 4C1
why_strong: $1,999 1BR confirmed June 2026 - under Stonegate median. Quiet cul-de-sac, surrounded by greenery and Woodford Park playground. Sub-1km to The Queensway retail.
why_weak: Subway 1.7km. Family-skewed building demographic.

name: 10 Hill Heights Road
address: 10 Hill Heights Road, Etobicoke, ON M8Y 2X2
why_strong: $1,775 1BR - cheapest verified 1BR in entire zone. Tucked-away Hill Heights street is the kind of address even Etobicoke residents don't know. Park Lawn retail 7-min walk.
why_weak: Bus-dependent. Older finishes likely. Very low profile - minimal review data online.

name: Royal Heights Apartments (8 Hill Heights)
address: 8 Hill Heights Road, Etobicoke, ON M8Y 2X2
why_strong: On-site laundry + garage parking + 2 floorplans. Sister-building to 10 Hill Heights - same quiet pocket. 2BR sub-$2,300.
why_weak: Bus to subway. Modest amenity set.

name: Royal Gate Apartments (1407 Royal York)
address: 1407 Royal York Road, Etobicoke, ON M9P 3A6
why_strong: H&R Property Management runs it well - confirmed 2BR $2,600. Outdoor pool + fitness centre on-site (rare in zone). Central A/C. Underground parking $120.
why_weak: 1BR currently waitlist - apply early. Northern edge of zone (Humber Heights), 28-min CVH drive. Subway 1.4km to Royal York.

name: Kingsway On The Park (1 Aberfoyle Cres)
address: 1 Aberfoyle Crescent, Toronto, ON M8X 2X8
why_strong: 180m to Islington subway station - 3-min walk, the shortest subway access of any building in zone. Door-to-door downtown ~25 min via subway (faster than driving). 24-storey concrete tower with full amenities, concierge, gym, pool. Islington Village retail/restaurants at door.
why_weak: Most expensive in zone - premium for subway proximity. Maintenance fees $0.94/sqft suggest landlord pass-through. Built 1990, common areas dated.

name: 2 Royal York Apartments
address: 2 Royal York Road, Etobicoke, ON M8V 2S6
why_strong: Median 1BR $1,895 confirmed Mar 2026. Renovated kitchens. Lake views from upper floors. Family-owned by Royal York Apartments Group since 1961 - stable landlord. Mimico Creek + lake trails 250m.
why_weak: South edge of zone, near QEW noise. Subway not walkable (~2km Royal York). Smaller balconies.

name: 20 Samuel Wood Way
address: 20 Samuel Wood Way, Etobicoke, ON M9B 0C9
why_strong: 450m to Islington subway - 6-min walk, second-best subway access in zone. Newer condo (2017). Mystic Pointe-style amenities. 2BR range tops at $3,020 but bottom $1,705 (split layouts).
why_weak: Some 2BR units are dens-marketed-as-bedrooms. Building is on Bloor/Islington intersection - busy.

name: The James Club (1135 Royal York)
address: 1135 Royal York Road, Etobicoke, ON M9A 0C3
why_strong: $1,800 1BR is the cheapest condo-quality rental in zone (Princess Group 2011 build). Indoor pool, sauna, gym, concierge - full amenity stack. Humbertown Loblaws + Shoppers at door.
why_weak: Royal York subway 1.6km - bus to subway. Some units 491sqft tiny. Globe and Mail noted 1 unit sold $404k under ask = soft resale market (may mean motivated landlords = negotiable rent).

name: Westlake Phase 1
address: 2220 Lake Shore Blvd W, Toronto
why_strong: Onni-built 2015 tri-tower mega-complex; Club W shared indoor pool/yoga/gym; floor-to-ceiling windows; steps to TTC 501 Queen streetcar and Mimico GO; trail at doorstep
why_weak: 23-26min to CVH via QEW (zone-wide weakness); large building density (490 units across 4 towers) means anonymous vibe; some east-facing units overlook Park Lawn traffic

name: Westlake Phase 2
address: 2200 Lake Shore Blvd W, Toronto
why_strong: Onni 2015 48-storey tallest in cluster; 24h concierge, indoor pool, squash courts, sauna; resident demographic skews 25-35 professional; verified active listing at $2500
why_weak: Same 23-26min QEW commute to CVH; building has 1352-unit mega scale across the three Westlake phases; some lower-floor units have podium-blocked views

name: Westlake Encore
address: 10 Park Lawn Rd, Toronto
why_strong: Newest Westlake building; closest to Park Lawn arterial = easiest QEW exit; 529 units; shared Club W amenities
why_weak: Slightly farther from trail than lakefront siblings (~250m); Park Lawn frontage = traffic noise on east side

name: Beyond the Sea Star Tower
address: 2230 Lake Shore Blvd W, Toronto
why_strong: Empire-built 2012; 45 storeys with on-site wine tasting room, private cinema, yoga studio, rooftop lounge with BBQs; suites 608+ sqft (larger floorplans than newer towers)
why_weak: $911/sqft luxury tier - rent skewed higher; 342 unit count is mid-size but Star Tower has limited 1bed availability

name: Waterscapes at Waterview
address: 80 Marine Parade Dr, Toronto
why_strong: Monarch 2014; 30-storey with Club Waterscapes (gym/pool/steam/yoga/theatre/BBQ terrace); 1bed units 625-690sqft well-sized; backs onto Humber Bay Shores Park
why_weak: Marine Parade is interior to the cluster (not lakefront), so south-view premium goes to Eau du Soleil/Lago; podium of building blocks lower-floor lake views

name: Explorer at Waterview
address: 58 Marine Parade Dr, Toronto
why_strong: Monarch 2007; mid-rise 14 storeys = quieter than Eau du Soleil scale; backs onto Humber Bay Shores Park; 270 units = community feel; lower rent than newer towers
why_weak: Older finishes than Westlake/Beyond the Sea; $0.99/sqft maintenance is high; smaller units start at 339sqft (microsuite tier)

name: Voyager II at Waterview
address: 2119 Lake Shore Blvd W, Toronto
why_strong: Monarch 2005; first Waterview building so established community; 16 storeys mid-rise; sky lounge with views; gym/pool/sauna/games room/golf simulator
why_weak: 20-year-old building - older HVAC, kitchens; $1.00/sqft maintenance high; eastern part of cluster = slightly more Lake Shore traffic exposure

name: Voyager I at Waterview
address: 2111 Lake Shore Blvd W, Toronto
why_strong: Monarch 2004 first tower; 27 storeys; steps to TTC 501 + Mimico GO; trail and Humber Bay Park direct; shared Voyager amenities (sky lounge/pool/sauna)
why_weak: Oldest building in the modern cluster (22 years); units smaller than Westlake; eastern cluster edge = farther walk to Eden Trattoria/IQ Food

name: Nautilus at Waterview
address: 16 Brookers Lane, Toronto
why_strong: Monarch 2012; 39 storeys = high-floor lake views; 6-foot deep balconies; 389 units; concierge + indoor pool + whirlpool + media room + library
why_weak: Brookers Lane is interior (not lakefront frontage); $0.91/sqft maintenance; 30lb dog max could matter for some (skip per instructions)

name: Jade Waterfront
address: 33 Shore Breeze Dr, Toronto
why_strong: Phantom Devs 2018 = newest finishes; 41 storeys; balconies averaging 400sqft (extraordinary); resort outdoor pool, golf simulator, dog wash, yoga; ER-friendly 24/7 concierge; HIGHEST singles density estimate in zone
why_weak: 53 days average market time = slow turnover; right next to Eau du Soleil = density of two megabuildings on one street

name: Cove at Waterways
address: 39 Annie Craig Dr, Toronto
why_strong: 2019 newest west-side building; smaller 281-unit boutique scale; 17 storeys = community feel; LOW $0.70/sqft maintenance; direct lakefront orientation; spa amenity
why_weak: Western edge of cluster = farther from Park Lawn QEW ramp (small penalty on CVH commute); smaller suite ceiling at 1093sqft (no large 2bed)

name: Grand Harbour A&B
address: 2285 Lake Shore Blvd W, Toronto
why_strong: Postmodern Beaux-Arts architecture (distinctive 14-storey archway); LARGE 757sqft minimum 1bed (way above zone average); 13-day avg market time = fast turnover; closest to QEW Park Lawn ramp
why_weak: $1.15/sqft maintenance HIGHEST in zone (utilities included but still); 1990 build = oldest in cluster; demographic skews older (38% singles est) - less of a young-professional vibe

name: Marina Del Rey I
address: 2261 Lake Shore Blvd W, Toronto
why_strong: Camrost-built linked twin tower; 800-1000sqft 1bed suites = SPACIOUS; Malibu Club access (indoor pool/tennis/squash/billiards) shared with Phase 2; west of cluster = closer to Park Lawn QEW
why_weak: Older building (~2003); rentals limited (1 active per Strata); shares amenities so peak times = crowded

name: Palace Pier
address: 2045 Lake Shore Blvd W, Toronto
why_strong: 47-storey 1978 iconic luxury tower; LARGE 920sqft minimum suites; 24h concierge + valet + complimentary shuttle bus + saltwater pool + tennis + spa + restaurant; closest building to downtown (10min); easiest QEW entry (Park Lawn ramp)
why_weak: OLDER demographic skew (25% singles est) - retirees and empty nesters dominate; 1978 build despite renovations; no young-professional energy of the modern cluster; rent expensive due to large unit floor

name: Palace Place
address: 1 Palace Pier Court, Toronto
why_strong: Ultra-luxury sister to Palace Pier; verified rentals at $3200-$4000/mo; concierge + valet; closest cluster building to downtown; trail steps away
why_weak: Most expensive in zone; trends OLDER (28% singles est); 2bed-dominant inventory makes 1bed scarce

name: Shoreline Towers
address: 2313 & 2323 Lake Shore Blvd W, Etobicoke, ON M8V 1A8
why_strong: Briarlane-managed mid-rise with confirmed July 1 2026 availability across 1BR and 2BR units; first month free promo; gym, EV charging, indoor/outdoor parking; heat+water included; pet-friendly; 250m to waterfront
why_weak: Pricing creeps above zone median ($1,875); 2313 building is older 1970s stock; 616sqft 1BR is tight for $1,997

name: Promenade Apartments
address: 2301 Lake Shore Blvd W, Etobicoke, ON M8V 1A4
why_strong: Homestead-managed; 2BR starting $1,999 below market for couples or den use; heat+water included; one month free promo; hardwood floors and balconies
why_weak: No 1BR or 3BR available right now (only 2BR live); older building with limited amenities (no gym); July 1 2026 availability not confirmed in listing

name: Berkley PM at 2545-2561
address: 2545-2561 Lake Shore Blvd W, Etobicoke, ON M8V 1C8
why_strong: VALUE PLAY at $1,550 for 1BR — well under zone median; one month free promo on bachelors; newly renovated; exercise room, pool; TTC at door for streetcar; Gardiner access
why_weak: Older mid-1960s building; hydro not included; no sqft or unit photos in listing; July 1 availability needs phone confirmation

name: Marina View Apartments
address: 2303-2307 Lake Shore Blvd W, Etobicoke, ON M8V 1A6
why_strong: DEEPEST VALUE PLAY in zone — 1BR from $1,400; water and heat included; pet-friendly; right next to Promenade and Shoreline Towers cluster on the lake
why_weak: Small footprints (400-600sqft max); older building; limited amenity list; sqft tight for an ER attending lifestyle

name: Floriri Village (2305 Lake Shore)
address: 2305 Lake Shore Blvd W, Etobicoke, ON M8V 1A6
why_strong: Renovated 1BR with stainless steel appliances; heat and water included; flexible open-house viewings Tues/Thurs/Sun
why_weak: Premium pricing for the zone; no sqft published; limited info on amenities

name: 245 Lakeshore Drive (MetCap)
address: 245 Lakeshore Drive, Etobicoke, ON M8V 2A8
why_strong: DIRECTLY backs onto Lake Ontario / Col Sam Smith Park — 50m to waterfront; renovated stainless steel kitchens; 880sqft 2BR is generous; underground parking; pet-friendly; MetCap-managed
why_weak: Only 52 units across 7 floors so vacancy is rare; 1BR rent not published (call required); 2BR at $2,449 is top-of-zone

name: Aquaview Condominiums
address: 3865 Lake Shore Blvd W, Etobicoke, ON M8W 0A2
why_strong: Modern 2012-built 16-storey condo; full luxury amenities (gym, outdoor pool, rooftop terrace, concierge, party room, BBQ); transit score 85; closest of any zone option to CVH (21 min); 1BR at $1,550-1,750 has been recently leased — value play if a unit pops
why_weak: Condo (individual landlord variability); only 1 unit currently for rent at this snapshot; closer to Marie Curtis end of zone — slightly farther from main Lakeshore restaurant strip

name: Minto Longbranch Urban Towns
address: 3580 Lake Shore Blvd W / 100 Long Branch Ave, Etobicoke, ON M8W 0C2
why_strong: Brand new 2024-built urban townhomes — rooftop terraces, garden architecture, energy-efficient; townhouse feel not apartment; steps from 501 streetcar and Long Branch GO; 130 unit project so inventory turns
why_weak: Most expensive in zone — $2,275 for 547sqft 1BR is $4.16/sqft; townhome layout means stairs (less ergonomic for 12-hour shifts); 2BR + 3-bath floorplans push past $2,800

name: 120 Long Branch Avenue
address: 120 Long Branch Ave, Etobicoke, ON M8W 0B4
why_strong: 1BR+den listing currently active at $2,300; part of Minto Longbranch West cluster — same modern stock; transit-rich (streetcar + Long Branch GO)
why_weak: 1+1 den layout not true 2BR; condo (individual landlord); thin inventory

name: 45 Forty Second St (Greenwin)
address: 45 Forty Second St, Etobicoke, ON M8W 3P4
why_strong: DIRECTLY across from Marie Curtis Park (best running/trail access in zone); 10 min to QEW; Greenwin-managed (institutional); current promo: 12 mo free parking + free utilities + free portable AC; open houses June 12 & 26
why_weak: Pricing not published on website (call for rates); separate from 55 Forty Second (different building same street); deepest west edge of zone

name: Eau Du Soleil - Water Tower
address: 30 Shore Breeze Dr, Etobicoke, ON M8V 0H7
why_strong: Lakefront tower, gym/pool/concierge, direct trail access, walkable to Humber Bay Park promenade
why_weak: Higher end of zone pricing; 1.10x median

name: Eau Du Soleil - Sky Tower
address: 10 Shore Breeze Dr, Etobicoke, ON M8V 0J1
why_strong: Tallest tower in HBS, panoramic views, full amenity package, on Waterfront Trail
why_weak: Premium pricing; condo board can be restrictive on AirBnB-style stays

name: Jade Waterfront Condos
address: 10 Park Lawn Rd, Etobicoke, ON M8Y 0B6
why_strong: Steps from Humber Bay Pkwy, Sobeys + LCBO + Shoppers ground floor, 24-hr concierge
why_weak: Park Lawn corridor traffic; building still leasing up post-2024 occupancy

name: Lago at the Waterfront
address: 65 Annie Craig Dr, Etobicoke, ON M8V 0C9
why_strong: Lakefront, indoor pool, direct trail/Humber Bay Park West access
why_weak: Limited grocery within 400m without crossing Park Lawn

name: Ocean Club Waterfront Condos
address: 2200 Lake Shore Blvd W, Etobicoke, ON M8V 1A4
why_strong: Resort-style amenities, lakefront, Loblaws across street, 501 streetcar at door
why_weak: Older HBS building (2010), some units dated finishes

name: Explorer Condos
address: 2230 Lake Shore Blvd W, Etobicoke, ON M8V 0B8
why_strong: Lake Shore W spine, walk to Humber Bay Park, Loblaws + LCBO 200m
why_weak: Smaller balconies, traffic noise on Lake Shore side

name: Beyond The Sea - North Tower
address: 2261 Lake Shore Blvd W, Etobicoke, ON M8V 3X1
why_strong: Waterfront, full amenity (pool, gym, party room), well-managed
why_weak: South of Lake Shore (longer walk to Mimico Village strip)

name: Beyond The Sea - Star Tower
address: 2025 Lake Shore Blvd W, Etobicoke, ON M8V 0E2
why_strong: Direct Humber Bay East access, lake views, walk to Humber Bay Park bridges
why_weak: Park Lawn / Lake Shore intersection congestion at peak

name: Vita on the Lake
address: 1 Edgewater Dr, Etobicoke, ON M8V 0G1
why_strong: Lakefront, infinity pool, very new build (2022), strong amenity
why_weak: Higher rent; HBS premium; condo rules variable by owner

name: Newcastle Lofts
address: 39 Newcastle St, Etobicoke, ON M8Y 1A3
why_strong: Boutique low-rise on quiet Mimico side street, exposed brick, walk to Birds and Beans
why_weak: Limited amenity (no gym/pool); smaller building

name: Vita Two on the Lake
address: 2 Edgewater Dr, Etobicoke, ON M8V 0G2
why_strong: Newest HBS tower (2024), full Mattamy amenity package, lake views
why_weak: Still leasing up; premium pricing

name: 29 Stanley Ave Boutique Rentals
address: 29 Stanley Ave, Etobicoke, ON M8V 1N4
why_strong: Walk to Mimico GO (8min), quiet residential side street, Eden Trattoria 5min
why_weak: Older building, no concierge, street parking only

name: 2417 Lake Shore W Rentals
address: 2417 Lake Shore Blvd W, Etobicoke, ON M8V 1C5
why_strong: Heart of Mimico Village strip, walk to Birds and Beans, San Remo Bakery, Eden
why_weak: Lake Shore traffic + streetcar noise; older building

name: Lakeshore Village - 3865 Lake Shore
address: 3865 Lake Shore Blvd W, Etobicoke, ON M8W 1R2
why_strong: Walk to Marie Curtis Park trail, MetCap-managed, well-priced, parking included
why_weak: Further from CVH? No — actually CLOSER (west end of zone)

name: 3636 Lake Shore Blvd W
address: 3636 Lake Shore Blvd W, Etobicoke, ON M8W 1P3
why_strong: Lakeshore Village strip, walk to Coffee Public, hardware/grocery, 501 streetcar
why_weak: Lower amenity (older mid-rise); fewer in-suite laundry units

name: Credit Village Square
address: 150 Lakeshore Rd W, Mississauga, ON L5H 3R2
why_strong: On Credit River at Lakeshore W, ~250m to Waterfront Trail, short walk to Brightwater retail and the Village; $1,900 entry is competitive for PC proper.
why_weak: Older mid-rise stock; sqft and exact 2BR pricing not consistently published — call to confirm unit availability for July 1.

name: 256 Lakeshore East Apartments
address: 256 Lakeshore Rd E, Mississauga, ON L5G 1G9
why_strong: $1,800 1BR is below PC median; one block to Lakeshore E shops + 600m to Waterfront Trail and Port Credit GO.
why_weak: Older walk-up stock, no published amenities; small landlord — verify pest/maintenance history by phone before signing.

name: 308 Lakeshore Road East
address: 308 Lakeshore Rd E, Mississauga, ON L5G 1H4
why_strong: Lower-level 1BR in heart of Lakeshore E village with direct access to Tall Oaks Park and lakefront within 5 min walk.
why_weak: Lower-level (basement-style) unit — limited natural light; only one unit listed, so quickly off-market.

name: 363 Lakeshore Road East
address: 363 Lakeshore Rd E, Mississauga, ON L5G 1H6
why_strong: $1,500 entry is the lowest 1BR in PC proper — exceptional value if unit condition matches photos.
why_weak: Sub-median pricing in this market screams either small basement unit or deferred maintenance — view in person before signing.

name: 2070 Camilla Road
address: 2070 Camilla Rd, Mississauga, ON L5A 2J7
why_strong: Renovated Studio/1/2/3BR mix with SS appliances; assigned parking; well-priced for newly upgraded mid-rise on QEW-adjacent transit corridor.
why_weak: 1967 build — bones can be loud; 1.8km from waterfront so daily lake-trail run is a drive or 20-min bike, not a walk.

name: 1130 Melton Drive
address: 1130 Melton Dr, Mississauga, ON L4Y 1V1
why_strong: $1,750 2BR is rare value in the GTA; quiet Lakeview pocket close to Dixie GO and Sherway Gardens.
why_weak: 23 min to CVH is the longest drive in this zone; Lakeview interior — needs a car for everything, almost zero walkable amenities.

name: North Shore Condos
address: 1 Hurontario St, Mississauga, ON L5G 0A3
why_strong: Lighthouse-block waterfront condo — 80m to Waterfront Trail, 5 min walk to Port Credit GO, 213-unit building with full amenities.
why_weak: Top of zone budget ($2,400+ for 1BR); condo-rental supply varies week-to-week, lease only what you actually tour.

name: 125 Lakeshore Road East
address: 125 Lakeshore Rd E, Mississauga, ON L5G 1E5
why_strong: One block from the lake in the dense Lakeshore E retail strip — restaurants, gym, GO station all in 8-min walk radius.
why_weak: Mixed-use building (office/retail at grade) so street noise; verify unit floor and exposure before signing.

name: 1515 Lakeshore Condos
address: 1515 Lakeshore Rd E, Mississauga, ON L5E 3E3
why_strong: 196-unit waterfront highrise directly across from Marie Curtis Park; pool, sauna, gym in-building — strong amenity stack for $2,100.
why_weak: 1978 build (HVAC/elevator age); on the far Toronto-edge of Lakeview, 19.5 min to CVH is the longest reasonable drive in-zone.

name: Beechwood Apartments
address: 480 Lakeshore Rd E, Mississauga, ON L5G 1J2
why_strong: $1,700 entry, heat/water/hydro included, 2 elevators, large balconies, EV charging, rooftop deck — best-value purpose-built in the zone.
why_weak: Coin laundry only (no in-suite W/D in base units); $80 parking extra; quiet stretch — fewer walkable restaurants than core PC.

name: NOLA Condos
address: 8 Ann St, Mississauga, ON L5G 0C2
why_strong: 71-unit boutique condo in core Port Credit (10-min walk to GO, lake, restaurants); all suites are large 1,665+ sqft so even 1BR feels like a real home.
why_weak: Suites this large translate to top-of-zone pricing; only 3 rental listings active so timing-dependent.

name: Brightwater I (215 Lakeshore W)
address: 215 Lakeshore Rd W, Mississauga, ON L5H 0A7
why_strong: Brand-new 2024 Brightwater build by Dundee-Kilmer; modern finishes, on-site retail/grocery, Waterfront Trail at the door, free shuttle to Port Credit GO.
why_weak: Brightwater rental supply varies — 5 condo listings active, all individual landlords so quality of finish/management is unit-by-unit lottery.

name: Skyrise Rentals (Daniels)
address: 2550 Eglinton Ave W, Mississauga, ON L5M 0Y2
why_strong: New-build 25-storey Daniels rental-controlled across from CVH/Erin Mills TC; 1 month free + 6 mo free parking promo; quartz/SS/9ft ceilings.
why_weak: Erin Mills Pkwy tower scale (less village feel); top of zone budget; concrete-jungle ambiance.

name: 2485 Eglinton West Condos
address: 2485 Eglinton Ave W, Mississauga, ON L5M 2V8
why_strong: 15-storey 316-unit condo individually-owned (negotiable landlords); $2,000/mo 1BR leased in <30d shows realistic price.
why_weak: Older 2010s stock; unit quality varies wildly by owner; mostly investor units.

name: The Kindred Condominiums (Daniels)
address: 2495 Eglinton Ave W, Mississauga, ON L5M 2V8
why_strong: BRAND NEW 25-storey Daniels (2025 interim occupancy); 24/7 concierge, co-work, gym; across from CVH and Erin Mills TC.
why_weak: New-build kinks; HOA-style condo board pet/short-let rules vary by owner; premium rent.

name: Waterford Tower (QuadReal)
address: 2645 Battleford Rd, Mississauga, ON L5N 3R8
why_strong: Killer July 1 promo: 2 months free + 12 mo free parking + no LMR upfront; pool, gym, in-unit W/D; pro-managed (QuadReal).
why_weak: Meadowvale (north of zone); 10 min drive to CVH; suburban concrete scale.

name: Lakeside Place
address: 2699 Battleford Rd, Mississauga, ON L5N 3R9
why_strong: Cheapest 1BR among Streetsville-adjacent pro-managed buildings ($2,029); steps to Meadowvale Town Centre amenities.
why_weak: Older 1980s low/midrise; further from Streetsville Village charm; mostly families.

name: Battleford & Glen Erin
address: 6599 Glen Erin Dr, Mississauga, ON L5N 2X3
why_strong: Affordable 1BR start ($2,049) for the Streetsville cluster; bus to Meadowvale GO; quiet residential.
why_weak: Furthest northwest in zone; 8.4 min to CVH; very family-dominated demographic.

name: Elora Apartments
address: 6515 Glen Erin Dr, Mississauga, ON L5N 8P9
why_strong: Newer (2010s) build with larger floorplates than older Battleford stock; gym + pool; pro-managed.
why_weak: Tucked between two older sibling buildings; suburban dead-end vibe; far from Streetsville Village.

name: 2797 Battleford Rd (Park Property)
address: 2797 Battleford Rd, Mississauga, ON L5N 3R1
why_strong: Best value in the zone (~$1,950 1BR); outdoor pool + tennis + sauna; 10 min walk to Meadowvale GO; all-included dishwasher/AC.
why_weak: Park Property (legacy operator, mixed reviews); furthest from CVH; 1970s build envelope.

name: Daniels Gateway - 4975 Southampton
address: 4975 Southampton Dr, Mississauga, ON L5M 8C5
why_strong: Recent price drop to $1,999 1BR (was $2,100); in-unit laundry + garage parking; well-built Daniels stock.
why_weak: Churchill Meadows/Erin Mills edge - no village vibe; townhouse-podium layout (some units are flats).

name: 296 Queen Street South Apt A
address: 296 Queen St S, Mississauga, ON L5M 1L8
why_strong: 700-1099 sqft 1BR (massive) in the heart of Streetsville Village; walkable Queen St strip; rare premium boutique unit.
why_weak: $3,250 is ZONE OUTLIER (~50% above median); luxury price for residency-end attending start.

name: 311 Queen Street South
address: 311 Queen St S, Mississauga, ON L5M 1L9
why_strong: Boutique low-rise on Streetsville Village main strip; walkable Queen St cafes/restaurants; closest to Streetsville Memorial Park (Credit River).
why_weak: Small building (limited amenities); condo-board pet/short-let rules vary.

name: Daniels First Home Destination
address: 3050 Erin Centre Blvd, Mississauga, ON L5M 0G5
why_strong: 130-unit 4-storey Daniels boutique condo - low-rise feel (rare in zone); 5 min to CVH; well-built Daniels stock.
